title: Swing Package Hierarchy & Component Architecture
description: A visual breakdown of the core Swing package structure and the inheritance hierarchy of its fundamental components.
relationships: javax.swing extends and builds upon AWT (java.awt.*)
JComponent is the base class for most Swing components, inheriting from java.awt.Container
Top-Level Containers host other components and are not contained within another Swing component
All Swing components are lightweight, except for Top-Level Containers which are heavyweight
